tracks.name: [Drone] 3AM
tracks.notes: Wavetable — cold glassy pad, slow LFO on wavetable position + filter cutoff

tracks.name: [Perc] SpineScroll
tracks.notes: Drum Rack — 4/4 grid + separate 7/8 chain, short metallic samples + noise bursts

tracks.name: [Bass] SubPulse
tracks.notes: Operator — pure sine oscillator, sidechain to kick

tracks.name: [Arp] Query
tracks.notes: Meld Fold FM — aggressive plucky arp, detuned, driven hard into distortion

tracks.name: [Vocal] VELA
tracks.notes: Sampler — clean vocal playback, minimal chain for max contrast

tracks.name: [FX] CorruptedVocal
tracks.notes: Granulator III (M4L) — NOT Sampler. Load from Packs > Granulator III. Resample VELA into it as source, automate Pos, Size, Spray, Pitch for chaotic inhuman fracture.
